entities.name: V
entities.context: User who reviews and confirms exercise logging entries before they are saved

entities.name: Confirmation Format
entities.context: Standardized template shown before logging workout data, requiring explicit user approval

entities.name: RPE Scale
entities.context: Rate of Perceived Exertion metric (1-10) captured per workout session

entities.name: Exercise Logging Protocol
entities.context: Structured process for recording sessions including exercises, sets, reps, skips, additions, modifications, duration, and notes

relationships.context: V must review and confirm the formatted summary before any workout data is logged
V follows this protocol to track workout sessions with structured data fields
The confirmation format is the human-in-the-loop checkpoint within the logging protocol
RPE is one of the standard metrics captured per logged session
